text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, could you try this patch: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/patch/trafficeserver-3.2.0.diff ? 
Original patch leaves some files after deinstalling.  And please check 
if the trafficeserver doesn't eat too much CPU while no loading. 
Thanks.
